prompt: Please do the task stated in `/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2_generation_prompts.md`, where the TASK_ID is `25e02866`.
codex_response:
Implemented the new ARC2 task package in [__init__.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25e02866/__init__.py#L1), [verifier.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25e02866/verifier.py#L4), and [generator.py](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/tasks/task_25e02866/generator.py#L125). The rule is: find the equal-sized filled square patches, treat the shared dominant patch color as transparent, normalize each patch to the origin, and overlay the non-fill accent cells into one composite output square. I used the summary hint only as an initial hypothesis; the `opus46` description matched the official examples, so no `notes.md` or new DSL primitive was needed.

Verification:
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.verify --task 25e02866` passed `3/3`.
- `conda run --no-capture-output -n arc python -m arc2.shared.build --task 25e02866 --n-examples 1000` produced [task.json](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25e02866/task.json), [originals.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25e02866/previews/originals.png), [preview_01.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25e02866/previews/preview_01.png), [preview_02.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25e02866/previews/preview_02.png), and [preview_03.png](/home/vapor/projects/realm/re-arc-2/re-arc/arc2/artifacts/25e02866/previews/preview_03.png).
- `./arc2_verify_generated_all.sh --task 25e02866` passed `1000/1000`.

The generator stays close to the official family: 2-4 equal-sized filled squares, near-corner quadrant placement on a contrasting background, and one sparse connected accent motif per square whose union defines the output.
